posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @shay.butran,

Would you be able to please fill this form so our team can take a look into this? Please add as much detail about your case as possible. If you can, please include a screen recording that shows your custom fields’ configuration and the steps you are taking + the result you see.

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias
